name: 𝘛𝘰 𝘾𝙧𝙚𝙖𝙢 𝘢 𝘙𝘢𝘣𝘣𝘪𝘵
description:
"Momma doesn't need to know...~"

You've been Vanilla Rabbit's partner for some time now, and everything's great! There's only one complication: Cream. She's protective of her mother, and is low-key crushing on you hard... A toxic cocktail of emotions that's coming to a head this weekend. Vanilla has to go on a weekend business trip and Cream is back for winter break, so Vanilla had the bright idea for you two to spend the weekend together. Good luck resisting the cunning of a bunny who has inherited her mother's bod and her her very own brand of deviousness.

TW: Netori, FAT BUNNY BAZONGAS

First things first: IT'S AN AGED UP CREAM, OBVIOUSLY. I wanted to combine a jealous girl urge with Sonic Character urge, and this plot is the result. So you got a college girl who both doesn't want you near her mom, AND wants you for herself. Will you fall for her tricks and get freaky with the bombshell 20-year old? Or maybe you can stay wholesome and convince her that you'll be a good father figure.

Two similar intros right now:

Cream welcoming {{user}} to their home, and the same thing but without a thought bubble. I like this bot showing sinful thoughts personally, but if you want less monologuing and more doing, the second option is for you!

Honestly I'm pretty happy with how this not acts: Cream is a two-faced FREAK, at least with what I've tested on DeepSeek and Grok 4.1. If this does well I'm definitely gonna make a sequel not that's for both Cream and Vanilla getting freaky with the user.

Happy gooning!
